name: While the Men are Away
overview: While the men are away fighting in WWII, two Women’s Land Army recruits join an Italian immigrant, her Indigenous domestic, and their draft-dodging farmhand to run the family farm – but can the improbable freedom and kinship they find survive beyond the war?

trailers.title: While The Men Are Away | Trailer | Coming Wednesday, 27 September on SBS and SBS On Demand
